__fixture_tag__: VENDORED ARXIV ANCHOR REFRESH — frozen snapshot, not measurement
query: cat:cond-mat.mtrl-sci AND (abs:perovskite-silicon tandem OR abs:disordered rocksalt OR abs:Li-metal anode)
raw#10_C3: verbatim arxiv abstracts; no n=6 lattice-fit applied; is_measurement: false

title: Visualizing Crystallization Dynamics and Transformation Pathways of Disordered Rocksalt Oxides During Thermally Activated Sol-Gel Synthesis
abstract_head: Studies chemical and structural transformations of disordered rocksalt Li1.2Mn0.4Ti0.4O2 using multiscale characterization. In situ heating TEM reveals distinct crystallization pathways at nanoscale, with some regions following classical transitions while others show kinetic shortcuts.

title: Characterizing Fill Factor Limitations in Perovskite-Silicon Tandem Solar Cells
abstract_head: Examines fill factor loss mechanisms in perovskite-silicon monolithic tandem solar cells through electroluminescence and photoshunt analysis. Identifies photoshunt as a key limitation and proposes strategies for improving device efficiency.

title: Electrochemical stability and lithium insertion at the Li|Li3OCl solid electrolyte interface
abstract_head: First-principles DFT calculations investigate Li metal anode and Li3OCl solid electrolyte interfaces. Results demonstrate structural stability with localized charge redistribution near interfaces.

title: Thermodynamic effects of solid electrolyte interphase formation from solvation and ionic association in water-in-salt electrolytes
abstract_head: Develops thermodynamic theory of hydration and ionic associations in electrical double layers of water-in-salt electrolytes. Analysis connects bulk activity changes to electrochemical stability window expansion.

title: Coupling Lattice Distortion and Cation Disorder to Control Li-ion Transport in Cation-Disordered Rocksalt Oxides
abstract_head: Demonstrates lattice distortion actively reshapes lithium percolation networks in cation-disordered rocksalt oxides. Designed high-entropy oxide achieves 71.9% Li+ percolation network and 256.3 mAh/g capacity.

title: CsCl seed layer homogenizes co-evaporated perovskite growth for high-efficiency fully textured perovskite-silicon tandem solar cells
abstract_head: Reports CsCl seed layer improving organic precursor incorporation across perovskite interfaces on textured silicon. Achieves 30.3% efficient perovskite-silicon tandem solar cells.

title: Short-Range Order and LixTM4-x Probability Maps for Disordered Rocksalt Cathodes
abstract_head: Quantitatively examines pair short-range order parameters and lithium cluster probabilities through Monte Carlo mapping. Proposes strategies to exceed random distribution limits in disordered rocksalt compositions.
notable_value: Wolverton group — direct sister to proxy citation in our fixture

title: Modeling phase transformations in Mn-rich disordered rocksalt cathodes with machine learning interatomic potentials
abstract_head: Uses charge-informed molecular dynamics to investigate phase transformation in Mn-rich disordered rocksalt materials. Shows transition metal migration creates spinel-like structures with improved lithium transport kinetics.

title: Monitoring charge separation of individual cells in perovskite/silicon tandems via transient surface photovoltage spectroscopy
abstract_head: Applies wavelength-dependent transient surface photovoltage to probe buried interfaces in tandem devices. Reveals hole minority drift behavior in silicon bottom cells and interface recombination mechanisms.

title: Prospects for market-specific design of Perovskite-Silicon tandem solar cells
abstract_head: Evaluates geographic location-specific annual energy yield and levelized cost of energy through calibrated simulations. Predicts twofold relaxation in degradation rate requirements compared to traditional analysis.

title: Operando imaging of crystal structure and orientation in all components of all-solid-state-batteries
abstract_head: Performs holistic investigation of all-solid-state-battery using operando synchrotron X-ray micro-diffraction imaging. Reveals lithium metal crystal orientation changes during plating and delithiation limitations in dense electrodes.
notable_value: direct operando imaging of Li-plating + delithiation limitation

title: Observing Li Nucleation at Li Metal-Solid Electrolyte Interface in All-Solid-State Batteries
abstract_head: Deep-potential molecular dynamics simulations investigate lithium cluster nucleation at anode/electrolyte interfaces. Observes initial cluster formation inside solid-electrolyte interphase with decreased bandgap enabling electronic conduction.

title: Modeling and theoretical design of next-generation lithium metal batteries
abstract_head: Reviews first-principles computational studies on lithium metal battery components. Summarizes theoretical research on sulfur cathodes, oxygen cathodes, lithium anodes, and solid-state electrolytes.

title: Highly Antioxidative Lithium Salt Enables High-Voltage Ether Electrolyte for Lithium Metal Battery
abstract_head: Introduces perfluorobutane sulfonate lithium salt in dimethoxyethane for high-voltage compatibility. Demonstrates durable cathode-electrolyte interphase formation enabling operation at 4.6V.

title: Thin Film Synthesis, Structural Analysis, and Magnetic Properties of Novel Ternary Transition Metal Nitride MnCoN2
abstract_head: Reports synthesis of MnCoN2 ternary nitride stabilized in cation-disordered rocksalt structure at controlled growth temperatures. Characterization reveals canted antiferromagnetic ground state below 10K.

title: The impact of spurious imaginary phonon modes on thermal properties of Metal-organic Frameworks
abstract_head: Examines how computational artifacts in phonon calculations affect MOF thermal property predictions for direct air capture applications.
notable_value: Persson group — computational artifact caveat for DAC predictions

title: LitMOF: An LLM Multi-Agent for Literature-Validated Metal-Organic Frameworks Database Correction and Expansion
abstract_head: Introduces an AI system to validate and repair structural errors in MOF databases, recovering 8,771 invalid entries relevant to direct air capture screening.

title: Enhancing Direct Air Capture through Potassium Carbonate Doping of Activated Carbons
abstract_head: Demonstrates through simulations that potassium carbonate doping enhances CO2 and water adsorption in activated carbon materials.

title: Comprehensive Structural Characterization of Charged Polymers Involved in Moisture-Driven Direct Air Capture
abstract_head: Uses advanced microscopy techniques to understand structural features of alkaline anion-exchange membranes for moisture-driven capture.

title: SERS Raman detection of the CO2 Moisture Swing
abstract_head: Employs surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy to monitor reversible carbonate-bicarbonate transformations in moisture swing sorbents.

title: The Open DAC 2025 Dataset for Sorbent Discovery in Direct Air Capture
abstract_head: Presents nearly 60 million DFT calculations across 15,000 MOFs with improved accuracy and machine-learned force fields for sorbent screening.
notable_value: 60M DFT calc on 15k MOFs — supersedes McDonald 2015 single-MOF proxy

title: Comparing classical and machine learning force fields for modeling deformation of solid sorbents relevant for direct air capture
abstract_head: Benchmarks classical and ML force fields against DFT for predicting framework deformation during gas adsorption.
notable_value: Sholl group — direct sister to MOF-DAC corpus

title: Intrinsic Direct Air Capture
abstract_head: Develops thermodynamic metrics based on material properties to evaluate sorbent performance independent of system design.

title: Design of Amine-Functionalized Materials for Direct Air Capture Using Integrated High-Throughput Calculations and Machine Learning
abstract_head: Combines ML predictions with DFT screening to identify nearly 2,500 novel amine-functionalized materials for CO2 capture.

title: The Open DAC 2023 Dataset and Challenges for Sorbent Discovery in Direct Air Capture
abstract_head: Releases 38M DFT calculations on 8,400+ MOFs with trained ML models for identifying promising DAC sorbents.
notable_value: predecessor to Open DAC 2025 dataset above

title: Toward Metal-Organic Framework Design by Quantum Computing
abstract_head: Demonstrates hybrid quantum-classical methods for calculating potential energy surfaces in MOF design for direct air capture.

title: Water-stable MOFs and Hydrophobically Encapsulated MOFs for CO2 Capture from Ambient Air and Wet Flue Gas
abstract_head: Reviews water-stable MOF materials and coating strategies for CO2 removal across diverse environmental conditions.

title: Reproducible Sorbent Materials Foundry for Carbon Capture at Scale
abstract_head: Proposes an autonomous materials foundry using machine learning to accelerate MOF evaluation for direct air capture applications.

title: A Carbon Dioxide Absorption System Driven by Water Quantity
abstract_head: Proposes humidity-controlled CO2 capture using nanoporous materials and carbonate ions, verified through simulations and experiments.
